text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! I did it! I! Am! Number! One!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The crowd sounded incredible! I'm so happy they
all seemed to enjoy the race so much! ♪
choice_data_list:
Don't get complacent—let's win the next one,
too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wow, even you're satisfied?! All that work I put in
really paid off!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right! I gotta make sure you're just as happy
with my next race too! Hip, hip, mun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whoops! I shouldn't get careless, right?
Overconfidence can be the greatest enemy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm going to work like every single moment
is a challenge! Let's do this! Ei, ei, mun!
